metadata.title: A Month of Living — Beyond travel, a new way of life
metadata.description: Meet experts and programs tailored to your goals in Jeju, Thailand, and Vietnam.

footer.description: A premium platform for designing your month-long stay in Jeju, Thailand, and Vietnam around your goals
footer.status: We are currently preparing for launch.

home.title: Beyond travel — a month that becomes a new way of life.
home.subtitle: Meet experts and programs tailored to your goals in Jeju, Thailand, and Vietnam.

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.cities: Bangkok · Chiang Mai · Phuket · Koh Samui

vietnam.name: Vietnam
vietnam.cities: Da Nang · Ho Chi Minh City · Hanoi · Nha Trang

home.notice: Fitness, yoga, golf, surfing, remote work, language learning, and wellness — we are building a service that connects you with local experts and programs that fit your goals.

common.unexpectedError: A temporary error occurred. Please try again later.

onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.description: Tell us a few basics and your travel preferences so we can handle bookings and recommendations. Fields marked * are required.

hints.destination: Select at least one country or city of interest.

validation.timezoneInvalid: Please select a time zone for the chosen country.
validation.localeInvalid: Please select a supported display language.
validation.purposesRequired: Select at least one travel purpose.
validation.purposesTooMany: You selected too many travel purposes.
validation.purposeUnknown: One or more selected purposes are not available.
validation.destinationRequired: Select at least one country or city of interest.
validation.countryUnavailable: One or more selected countries are not available.
validation.cityUnavailable: One or more selected cities are not available.
validation.stylesRequired: Select at least one travel style.
validation.stylesTooMany: You selected too many travel styles.
validation.styleInvalid: One or more selected styles are not available.
validation.languageInvalid: One or more selected languages are not available.
validation.phoneInvalid: The phone number format is invalid.
validation.phoneTooLong: The phone number is too long.
validation.budgetInvalid: Budget must be a number of 0 or more.
validation.budgetRange: The maximum budget must be greater than or equal to the minimum.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The address may be incorrect, or the page may have been moved or deleted.

common.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
common.unexpectedError: A temporary error occurred. Please try again later.

login.title: Log in
login.description: Log in with your email and password.
login.genericError: The email or password is incorrect, or the email has not been verified.
login.oauthError: We couldn't complete social sign-in. Please try again later or log in another way.
login.resetSuccessNotice: Your password has been reset. Please log in with your new password.
login.deletedNotice: Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using 한달살기.

oauth.consentNotice: By continuing with social sign-in, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

register.title: Sign up
register.description: Create an account with your email and password.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including at least one letter and one digit.
register.termsLabel: (Required) I agree to the Terms of Service
register.privacyLabel: (Required) I agree to the collection and use of personal information
register.marketingLabel: (Optional) I agree to receive marketing communications

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.description: Unless no account exists for that address or it is already verified, a verification email has been sent. Open the link in the email to complete your registration.
sent.note: If the email hasn't arrived, check your spam folder or request it again below.
sent.resendDone: Your request has been processed. If an unverified account exists for that address, a verification email will be sent.

confirm.title: Verify your email
confirm.description: Click the button below to complete email verification.
confirm.missingToken: The verification link is invalid. Please check the link in your email.

verified.title: Email verified
verified.description: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.

alreadyVerified.title: Already verified
alreadyVerified.description: This account has already been verified. Please log in.

expired.title: Verification link expired
expired.description: The verification link has expired. Please request a new verification email.

invalid.title: Invalid verification link
invalid.description: The verification link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new verification email if needed.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email and we will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.done: Your request has been processed. If an account exists for that address, a reset email will be sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Enter the new password you want to use.
resetPassword.expired: The reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.invalid: The reset link is invalid or has already been used. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.missingToken: The reset link is invalid. Please check the link in your email.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.passwordTooLong: The password is too long. Please use a shorter password.
validation.passwordNeedsLetterAndDigit: The password must include at least one letter and one digit.
validation.consentRequired: Please agree to the required terms.

verification.subject: [한달살기] Please verify your email
verification.body:
Welcome to 한달살기.

Open the link below to complete email verification. The link is valid for 24 hours and can be used only once.

{url}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: [한달살기] Password reset instructions
passwordReset.body:
A password reset was requested for your account.

Set a new password using the link below. The link is valid for 30 minutes and can be used only once.

{url}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.

accountDeletion.subject: [한달살기] Confirm account deletion
accountDeletion.body:
Account deletion was requested for your account.

Open the link below to complete deletion. The link is valid for 30 minutes and can be used only once. Deleted account data cannot be recovered.

{url}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email. Your account will not be deleted.

account.title: Account settings
account.description: View and manage your login account.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting your account permanently removes your profile and login data. This cannot be undone.

request.title: Delete account
request.description: Proceeding will permanently delete your account data as described below. To continue, request a confirmation link by email.
request.emailNotice: A confirmation email will be sent to {email}.

deleted.title: Deleted when you leave
deleted.profile: Personal details stored on your account (profile, contact info)
deleted.social: Google and Kakao social login connections

kept.title: Kept for legal and transactional records
kept.bookings: Completed or cancelled bookings with payment and refund records
kept.reviews: Reviews, messages, and support history you created

request.note: You cannot delete your account while bookings, payments, disputes, or support requests are in progress.
request.blocked: Your account cannot be deleted right now. Please finish any bookings, payments, disputes, or support requests in progress first.
request.unsupported: Online deletion is not available for this account type. Please contact support.

sent.title: Confirmation email sent
sent.description: We sent an account deletion link to your account email. The link is valid for 30 minutes.
sent.note: If you cannot find the email, check your spam folder.

confirm.title: Confirm account deletion
confirm.warning: This cannot be undone. You will be signed out immediately and your account's personal data will be permanently deleted.
confirm.confirmHint: Type DELETE in capital letters to continue.
confirm.missingToken: A deletion confirmation link is required. Open the link from your email again or request a new one.
confirm.invalid: This deletion link is not valid or was already used. Please request a new confirmation email.
confirm.expired: This deletion link has expired (valid for 30 minutes). Please request a new confirmation email.
confirm.blocked: Your account cannot be deleted right now. Please finish any bookings, payments, disputes, or support requests in progress first.

invalid.title: Invalid deletion link
invalid.description: The deletion link is not valid or was already used. Request a new confirmation email if needed.

expired.title: Expired deletion link
expired.description: The deletion link has expired. Please request a new confirmation email.

blocked.title: Account cannot be deleted
blocked.description: Your account cannot be deleted in its current state. Please check bookings, payments, disputes, or support requests in progress.

error.title: Temporary error
error.description: Something went wrong while processing the deletion. Please try again later.
